trades.reasoning: Perfect score 100 with all 5 bullish signals — RSI in momentum zone (61.3), MACD bullish crossover with rising histogram, price above SMA-20, and volume surge — plus strong AI/data tailwind in a risk-on session; uses remaining cash to fill an open slot.

decisions.briefing: Markets are clearly risk-on today with NASDAQ up 1% and S&P 500 up 0.6%, creating ideal conditions to deploy the remaining $577 in cash. PLTR scored a perfect 100 with volume confirmation and clean momentum setup — it's the highest-quality entry available that fits within available cash. Existing positions remain intact with no stop-loss triggers visible; the portfolio continues to outperform significantly at +32.6%.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities rallied broadly on June 29 as risk appetite returned, with the NASDAQ outperforming the S&P 500, suggesting investors rotated into growth and technology names. The strength in satellite/space stocks (RKLB, ASTS, PL all scoring 100 with volume surges) points to renewed speculative enthusiasm in defense-adjacent tech sectors. AI infrastructure plays like PLTR and AMZN also saw strong momentum, reflecting continued institutional conviction in the AI buildout theme.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股於6月29日全面反彈，市場風險偏好明顯回升，納斯達克指數漲幅優於標普500，顯示資金積極輪動至成長股及科技板塊。衛星及太空概念股（RKLB、ASTS、PL均獲滿分且成交量激增）強勢表現，反映市場對國防相關科技行業的投機熱情重燃。AI基礎建設龍頭如PLTR及AMZN動能強勁，機構資金對AI建設浪潮仍維持高度信心。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Momentum investing is a strategy that buys stocks showing strong recent price gains on the theory that winners tend to keep winning in the short term. Today's top candidates — all scoring 100 with RSI in the bullish zone (55–70), MACD crossovers, and volume surges — are textbook momentum setups. The risk is that momentum can reverse sharply when sentiment shifts, which is why RSI above 70 (overbought) is treated as a caution signal even when MACD looks good.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 動能投資是一種追蹤近期強勢股票的策略，其理論基礎是「強者恆強」——短期內漲勢強勁的股票往往持續上漲。今日評分滿分的候選股（RSI處於55–70動能區、MACD出現金叉、成交量放大）均是教科書式的動能訊號。此策略的風險在於，一旦市場情緒逆轉，動能股可能急速回落，因此即使MACD看漲，RSI超過70（超買）仍應視為警示信號。
